◎简　　介  

　　Three friends meet one summer at a skydiving center. Adventurous, they spend most of their time jumping for thrills as well as jumping to escape what haunts them. Rafael, 20, dreams of becoming a pilot; Manu, 19, must care for her mother who suffers from cancer and Charles, 30, owns the skydiving center.
